raw: The pass admits up to 4 people at $5 per person . Children under 18 are admitted for free . This is an e-voucher that does not need to be picked up at the library . You will receive the pass in an email once you have placed your reservation. This pass is only valid for use on the date that is printed on the pass . The museum is closed on Tuesdays. This pass is funded by the Friends of the Stoneham Library.

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].age_range: Children under 18 are admitted for free
